defect: standing in line with tendon during stressing (HAZ)
prompt: Identify the safety hazards, their severity, and the immediate controls required.
scenario: You are on a commercial construction project governed by building codes, submittals, and third-party inspections. The work under review is Post-tensioning, part of the Structural & Ironwork scope. The observed field condition is: standing in line with tendon during stressing (HAZ). title: Hazard check: Post-tensioning (commercial project)
